title: viraajbindra-a11y/Astrion-OS
summary: Astrion OS — AI-native operating system with 50 apps, native GTK3 shell, real terminal, Ollama AI, Flatpak app store. Runs on Surface Pro 6 and VMs.

title: sriinnu/kosha-discovery
summary: Discovery registry for AI models, credentials, and pricing across local and cloud providers. Library, CLI, and HTTP API.

title: NotYuSheng/TracePcap
summary: Self-hosted LLM network packet analysis tool. Visualize network traffic patterns, analyze packet flows, generate intelligent filters, and gain insights through AI-powered analysis. Perfect for network troubleshooting, security analysis, protocol debugging, or educational purposes.

title: raydenai/queen-protocol
summary: Queen Protocol v2.12.0 — Automated enforcement daemon (colony-watcher.sh runs every 10 min via launchd, auto-normalizes failing reports + seals stale state) + 6 operator-discipline patterns from Elev-W1 22-shard colony. 22/22 reached CONVERGE_AUDIT_PASS this session. Workers: claude/kimi/codex/gemma4-local.

title: Olooce/inkwell-V2.0
summary: INKWELL StoryScape leverages AI to empower young storytellers. It assesses children's grammar and sentence structure and generates comics from their creative sentences, transforming writing into engaging visual stories.

title: freessunky-bit/lmmaster
summary: 한국어 기반 로컬 AI Companion · Tauri 2 + Rust + React · 외부 통신 0 · LM Studio + Ollama wrapper

title: JohanYP/Opencode-Assistant
summary: Self-hosted personal AI assistant on Telegram. Powered by OpenCode + Claude Sonnet (free big-pickle). OpenClaw skills compatible. SQLite + MCP live memory with optional Ollama vector search.

title: dyad-sh/dyad
summary: Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

title: robeertm/DocuSort
summary: Self-hosted, AI-powered document organizer with OCR, receipt scanning, line-item analytics, and headless backup. Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, or local Ollama. Built for a Synology NAS but runs anywhere.

title: pat-the-geek/obsirag
summary: Un cerveau qui apprend de tes notes Obsidian : RAG local, génération d'insights automatiques, enrichissement web sur sources fiables. Python · LanceDB · Ollama · Euria

title: CrispStrobe/CrispSorter
summary: AI-powered document organiser. Extracts text and/or sorts documents: Drop in a bunch of PDFs, DOCX files, or ebooks, and it extracts Document Text, identifies Title, Author, and Year, with a local or remote LLM, and moves them into folders, and/or keeps the extracted text.

title: neochaotic/powerlab
summary: The headless OS panel for home servers and edge boxes — self-hosted, AI-friendly, beautiful.

title: 1Fanshen/nocoin-miner
summary: Open-source mining bot for the NoCoin ($NOCOIN) puzzle protocol — solves NLP/crypto puzzles, earns 500 $NTC each, no stake required, runs on Node.js with optional LLM fallback (Ollama / OpenAI / OpenRouter).

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: pioneerdotai/pioneer
summary: Not another CLI personal AI assistant. Native desktop app. Pure Rust. Runs anywhere.

title: CivicSuite/civicsuite
summary: Umbrella repo for the open-source CivicSuite municipal operations suite — charter, specs, roadmap, ADRs, governance, compatibility matrix. Code lives in sibling repos.

title: b31o8321/dzmm
summary: AI-powered TRPG engine — LLM as GM, streaming narrative, dice system, screenplay-driven gameplay. Vue 3 + FastAPI. 本地 LLM 驱动的 AI 跑团引擎。大语言模型担任 GM，支持流式叙事、骰子判定、剧本驱动推进。Vue 3 + FastAPI。

title: ghbalf/freecad-ai
summary: AI-powered assistant workbench for FreeCAD — generate 3D models from natural language

title: MarlBurroW/kinbot
summary: Self-hosted AI agents with persistent memory, real identity, and collaboration. One process, one SQLite file, zero cloud.

title: tosin2013/helmdeck
summary: A self-hosted, containerized platform for AI agents, exposed as Capability Packs — schema-validated, one-shot JSON tools — and native MCP. The defining metric is ≥90% pack success on 7B–30B-class open-weight models, something no frontier-targeting competitor is optimizing for.
